cases.prompt: 새 프로젝트 시작하려는데 스택 뭐로 할까? 이전 프로젝트들이랑 일관성 있게 하고 싶어.

assertions.text: The agent reads the user's cumulative tech preference matrix from the wiki.
The agent recommends a stack consistent with the user's previous projects.
The agent lints the new project for drift from the established preferences.

cases.prompt: Audit my 25 repos and tell me which ones drifted from my usual stack.

assertions.text: The agent audits the repos against the wiki tech matrix.
The agent reports which repos drifted from the usual stack.
The agent can update the tech preference matrix from the audit findings.
